dict.target: Material 扁平化
行为

dict.source: Hide left toolbar with left panel (Desktop)
dict.target: 左侧面板关闭时隐藏左侧工具栏 (桌面端)

dict.source: Hides the left toolbar ("ribbon") when the left panel is closed. (Windows & Linux Only)
dict.target: 当左侧面板关闭时隐藏左侧工具栏（“ribbon”）。（仅限 Windows 和 Linux）
更轻松地拖动窗口 (桌面端)

dict.source: Allows you to drag the window by the tab title bar (if enabled) as well as the left sidebar (ribbon). Recommended to leave on unless you have issues.
dict.target: 允许您通过标签页标题栏（如果启用）以及左侧边栏（ribbon）拖动窗口。除非遇到问题，否则建议保持开启。
拖动活动标签页时移动窗口 (桌面端)

dict.source: When on, dragging an active tab will drag the entire window, instead of the tab itself.
dict.target: 开启后，拖动活动标签页将移动整个窗口，而不是标签页本身。
钢笔模式 (用于 Excalidraw)

dict.source: Currently only applies to Excalidraw plugin in tray mode. Moves the toolbar to the left for easier access, and hides the welcome splash.
dict.target: 目前仅适用于托盘模式下的 Excalidraw 插件。将工具栏移至左侧以便于访问，并隐藏欢迎屏幕。
外观
增强强调色饱和度

dict.source: Lets the fully saturated accent through on certain elements. May cause readability problems, depending on chosen accent color.
dict.target: 让完全饱和的强调色在某些元素上显示。根据所选强调色，可能会导致可读性问题。
暗化浅色模式

dict.source: Uses a slightly tinted grey in light mode, instead of pure white, for backgrounds.
dict.target: 在浅色模式下使用微带色调的灰色作为背景，而不是纯白色。
在文档上方添加滚动空间

dict.source: Adds some space above documents, so you can scroll them a little further down. Similar to Dropbox Paper.
dict.target: 在文档上方添加一些空间，以便您可以向下滚动更多。类似于 Dropbox Paper。
禁用工具提示动画
禁用工具提示上的“弹出”动画。
启用透明度支持（桌面端）

dict.source: Make parts of the main window translucent. Use instead of built-in transparency option. Both mac and windows require native frame to be set to system for this to work. Windows additionally requires Mica for Everyone, with the following settings for obsidian - Titlebar Color System, Backdrop Type Mica, Extend Frame into Client Area On
dict.target: Make parts of the main window translucent. Use instead of built-in transparency option. Both mac and windows require native frame to be set to system for this to work. Windows additionally requires Mica for Everyone, with the following settings for obsidian - Titlebar Color System, Backdrop Type Mica, Extend Frame into Client Area On
Native Windows Right-Click Menus (Desktop)

dict.source: Makes right-click menus on Windows look like Windows 11 native menus.
dict.target: Makes right-click menus on Windows look like Windows 11 native menus.
Remove top padding (Desktop)

dict.source: Removes the bit of space above the tabs.
dict.target: Removes the bit of space above the tabs.
Hide sidebar header (Mobile)

dict.source: Hides the header that appears at the top of the left sidebar on mobile. This will remove the buttons for opening settings and switching vaults, so you'll have to do those using the command palette.
dict.target: Hides the header that appears at the top of the left sidebar on mobile. This will remove the buttons for opening settings and switching vaults, so you'll have to do those using the command palette.
Button shapes (Mobile)

dict.source: Displays many buttons on mobile as 'chips' with a distinct background. Turn off for a more minimal style and tighter spacing.
dict.target: Displays many buttons on mobile as 'chips' with a distinct background. Turn off for a more minimal style and tighter spacing.
Fonts
预览字体
用于预览模式
编辑器字体
用于编辑模式
等宽字体
用于代码块
悬浮操作按钮设置
启用 FAB (移动端)

dict.source: Displays a floating button in the bottom right, on phones. Tab title bar must be on!
dict.target: 在手机底部右侧显示悬浮按钮。必须开启标签页标题栏！
启用 FAB (桌面端)

dict.source: Displays a floating button in the bottom right, on computers. Tab title bar must be on! (May not be visible in horizontally split views)
dict.target: 在电脑右下角显示浮动按钮。需开启标签页标题栏！
在移动端隐藏标签栏按钮

dict.source: Hides buttons in the optional tab status bar, excluding the one used for the FAB. (Useful with Commander plugin)
dict.target: 隐藏标签栏中的按钮（不包括用于浮动按钮的按钮）。（配合 Commander 插件使用）
可自定义的浮动按钮操作

dict.source: Uses the first button in the optional tab status bar for the FAB. Set an item of your choice to appear first using the Commander plugin to customize the FAB action.
dict.target: 使用标签栏中的第一个按钮作为浮动按钮。使用 Commander 插件将您选择的项设为第一项，以自定义浮动按钮操作。
